user.title: City of York Bins
user.description: Enter your postcode to find your address and bin collection schedule.

address.title: Select your address
address.description: Choose your address from the list below.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the York API. Please check your internet connection and try again.
error.no_addresses: No addresses were found for this postcode. Please double-check it and try again.
error.no_bins: No bin collections were found for this address. Please contact City of York Council.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please check the Home Assistant logs.
